Booking new projects for Q4

We build the parts
of the internet
you run on.

Fen Studio designs and builds websites, dashboards, and internal tools for teams who need software that works quietly in the background — not just software that looks good in a pitch deck.

See the workStart a project

One studio, the whole stack.

Most agencies stop at the homepage. We stay for the system underneath it.

Web design

Identity, layout, and interaction design for marketing sites and product front-ends — built to hold your brand's voice, not a template's.

Development

Next.js builds that ship fast and stay maintainable — no page-builder debt to inherit later.

Digital solutions

Dashboards, client portals, and internal tools — the software layer behind the website that most agencies skip.

Care & growth

Ongoing edits, monitoring, and iteration after launch, billed monthly instead of quoted per request.

Why Fen Studio

Design, engineering, and growth working together.

We build websites, dashboards, and tools that move faster than the market, keep teams aligned, and help founders launch with confidence.

Built for clarity

Product-first websites, landing pages, and tools with crystal-clear messaging, fast load time, and intuitive product hierarchy.

Launch-ready systems

Next.js architecture, CMS workflows, and polished handoff materials that make launch and scale feel easy.

Long-term support

Ongoing maintenance, analytics reviews, and iterative improvements so your digital product stays modern and reliable.

Editorial showcase

One dedicated showcase, done beautifully.

Instead of scattering effects across the page, this section concentrates the visual energy into a more editorial and elevated experience.

Materiality

Materiality

Air, depth, and a neutral palette that feels sculptural, calm, and premium.

Motion

01

Texture

02

Depth

03

Visual story

A premium block with subtle motion, tactile texture, and a more refined sense of presence.

High-impact imagery

Each panel reads like a premium editorial frame: clean, luminous, and crafted to impress.

Detail

Luxury materials, elegant contrast, and a sense of exclusivity in every block.

How a project actually runs

01

Discovery

Week 1

A working session on the actual problem — audience, competitors, and the one metric this project needs to move.

02

Design

Weeks 2–3

Token system, layout concepts, and a full design file, reviewed together before a single line of code is written.

03

Build

Weeks 3–5

Next.js implementation, staged for review as it's built — not delivered as one surprise at the end.

04

Launch

Week 6

Domain, hosting, analytics, and a handoff doc you can actually read.

05

Iterate

Ongoing

Monthly care plan for edits, fixes, and small builds as the product keeps moving.

Ready to start something bold?

Tell us what you're building.

A short reply, usually within a day — with the honest version of whether we're the right fit.
